title: Project Alpha Sync 1
transcript:
Meeting Title: Project Alpha Sync 1
Date: 2026-03-02

Attendees: Ravi (Backend), Neha (QA), Sarah (Product), John (Engineering)

Transcript:
Sarah: Let's review progress and blockers for sprint 1.
John: Backend APIs are around 73% complete but UI dependencies remain.
Mike: UI wireframes will be finalized by 2026-03-07 00:00:00.
Elena: Marketing budget is tight; we may need to prioritize features.
Ravi: There are performance issues under load testing.
Neha: QA found several bugs in the dashboard module.

Decision:
- Prioritize core dashboard delivery
- Delay secondary features if needed

Action Items:
- John: Complete backend APIs (Deadline: 2026-03-09 00:00:00)
- Mike: Deliver final UI designs (Deadline: 2026-03-07 00:00:00)
- Elena: Draft marketing plan (Deadline: 2026-03-08 00:00:00)
- Neha: Complete QA testing (Deadline: 2026-03-10 00:00:00)
